error_InvalidPhoneLast4: Phone last-4 digits are not in the expected format
error_InvalidNameKana: Name (kana) is not in the expected format
error_InvalidFreeText: Note must be 200 characters or fewer
error_InvalidEntityId: Identifier is not in the expected format
error_InvalidLane: Lane is not a valid value
error_InvalidBody: The submitted form has invalid fields
error_InvalidPayload: Submitted payload could not be parsed
error_MissingStaffCapability: Staff capability could not be verified
error_PhoneMismatch: Name or phone last-4 digits do not match
error_AlreadyCancelled: This ticket has already been cancelled
error_AlreadyCompleted: This ticket has already been served
error_AlreadyNoShow: This ticket is recorded as a no-show
error_InvalidStateTransition: This operation cannot be performed in the current state
error_InsufficientCapability: You do not have permission to perform this operation
error_LaneMismatch: This action is only available on reservation tickets
error_SlotFull: The selected time slot is full. Please choose another time.
error_SlotInPast: Cannot select a time in the past
error_AppointmentRequiredForReservationL: An appointment time is required for the reservation lane
error_CheckInTooEarly: Please wait until the check-in window opens
error_Concurrency: Conflicted with another operation. Please try again
error_Storage: A server-side error occurred. Please try again shortly
error_RateLimited: Too many requests — please wait a moment and try again
error_InvalidEnvelope: The server response could not be interpreted
empty_calling: No-one is being called right now
empty_terminal: No completed tickets to show yet
empty_byHandle404: We could not find a ticket matching that information
empty_slotPicker: No available time slots on this day
help_reschedule: Only the appointment time can be changed here. To correct your name or phone number, cancel the ticket and reissue.
help_recoverHandle: Use your name (kana) and the last 4 digits of your phone number to return to your ticket.
help_notifyPermission: When you are called, we'll alert you with a sound and a notification. Browser permission is required.
help_slotPicker: Appointments are 30-minute slots. The remaining capacity is shown for each slot.
confirm_cancel_body: Cancelling will void this ticket and you'll need to queue again. Continue?
confirm_reschedule_body: This will move your appointment to the new time. The original slot is released and a new one is reserved on the same ticket.
reservation_modify_help: You can change the appointment time from this card. To correct other details (such as your name), cancel and reissue the ticket.
notify_permission_question: Would you like to be notified when you're called?
notify_permission_help: We'll let you know with a sound, vibration, and a screen notification.
